---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement / 提交功能建议
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary / 需求概述

What problem are you trying to solve?

你希望解决什么问题？

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

Describe the workflow, command, or API capability you want.

请描述你期望的工作流、命令或 API 能力。

## Alternatives Considered / 备选方案

What alternatives did you consider?

## User Impact / 用户价值

Who benefits from this change, and how?

## Additional Context / 补充信息

Add examples, mock CLI usage, links, or design notes if useful.
